title: Baby Bio Houseplant Bug Killer Ultra - Fast-Acting Bug Killer Spray - Effective Insect Control for Houseplants - Protection for Houseplants, 1 Litre
features: REPELLANT: Fast-acting Bug Killer spray that provides up to 8 weeks pest protection for your houseplants.
PEST PROTECTION: A revolutionary formula that stops pests in just 1 hour with visible results in just 1 day.

INDOOR AND GARDEN: Baby Bio Houseplant Bug Killer Ultra's unique butonolide-based formula is both a contact and systemic formulation, ensuring that plants are freed from insect attack quickly, with long-lasting protection.
EXTRA PROTECTION: Controls Aphids, Leaf-Hoppers, Scale Insects, Whiteflies and many more species, offering ultimum protection for your houseplants
EASY TO USE: Suitable for a variety of houseplants, as well as suitable for use outdoors on ornamentals and edibles, in greenhouses and conservatories.
description: From the manufacturer LONGER LASTING PROTECTION FOR HEALTHIER, PEST-FREE HOUSEPLANTS LASTING PROTECTION Baby Bio Houseplant Bug Killer Ultra works systemically within the plant to prevent pest infestations. By being absorbed and distributed throughout the plant, it creates a protective barrier that lasts for up to 8 weeks, ensuring continuous defence against further aphid attacks. It helps maintain the health and vitality of your houseplants, reducing the need for frequent treatments and allowing your plants to thrive without constant worry of pest damage. PEST-FREE HOUSEPLANTS Results will be visible on houseplants within just 24 hours of using Baby Bio Houseplant Bug Killer Ultra, providing fast relief from pests and ensuring quick action against infestations. This rapid response helps restore the health of your houseplants quickly, so you can enjoy healthier, pest-free greenery in your home. EFFECTIVE FORMULA This powerful solution works swiftly to stop pests like aphids, whiteflies, scale insects, and lily beetles from feeding within just 1 hour of application. Once sprayed, the pests are quickly affected, halting their damage and giving your plants immediate relief. With its fast-acting formula, you’ll see the results in no time, ensuring your plants stay protected and thriving.
